prompt: A giant grim reaper scythe weapon standing upright, one very long straight dark wooden haft with a huge sweeping curved steel blade mounted at the top end, weathered pitted rusty metal blade and aged worn wood shaft, a single tall menacing death scythe, blade curving to one side
